articles.title: Binance USD (BUSD) Becomes a Top 10 Crypto, Market Cap Exceeds $11B
articles.description: Binance USD (BUSD) is now ranked 10th on Coinmarketcap Binance USD’s market cap has exceeded $11 Billion There are now three stablecoins in the top 10 rankings according to market cap The use of Binance USD in DeFi is gaining popularity The Binance USD (BUSD) stablecoin is now a top 10 digital asset on Coinmarketcap. articles.title: Binance CEO CZ Has Eyes Peeled For An Ether vs. BNB Tussle As Network Wars Intensify
articles.description: The network rivalry between Ethereum and Tron may have been the most pronounced in the past, and most recently, that onlookers may have forgotten that the former is also a Binance competitor, thanks to the arrival of the Binance smart chain. An Ether and BNB rivalry is brewing With the arrival of the Binance smart […]

articles.title: ‘Never Said The Word Sell’—Elon Musk Boosts The Price Of Dogecoin As Bitcoin And Crypto Lose Billions
articles.description: Elon Musk, the dogecoin-touting Tesla billionare, has boosted the price of the meme-based cryptocurrency, tweeting his son is "holding his doge like a champ"...

articles.title: Dogecoin Prints Green Candle as Elon Musk Praises His Son "Lil X" for Hodling DOGE “Like a Champ”
articles.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk has jokingly admired his son "Lil X" for holding his Dogecoins and never thinking of selling them

articles.title: XRP Ledger Foundation Opens New Office in This Innovative European Country
